'''wamoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wham|wham]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wham|wham]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wamoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæmeseth|wæmeseth]] || [[word:wæmesej|wæmesej]] || [[word:wæmesesh|wæmesesh]] || [[word:wæmese|wæmese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wamomosoth|wamomosoth]] || [[word:wamomosoj|wamomosoj]] || [[word:wamomososh|wamomososh]] || [[word:wamomoso|wamomoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wamosoth|wamosoth]] || [[word:wamosoj|wamosoj]] || [[word:wamososh|wamososh]] || [[word:wamoso|wamoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wamofsoth|wamofsoth]] || [[word:wamofsoj|wamofsoj]] || [[word:wamofsosh|wamofsosh]] || [[word:wamofsof|wamofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wamosotho|wamosotho]] || [[word:wamosojo|wamosojo]] || [[word:wamososho|wamososho]] || [[word:wamosoko|wamosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wamosoth|wamosoth]] || [[word:wamosoj|wamosoj]] || [[word:wamososh|wamososh]] || [[word:wamoso|wamoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wamosothol|wamosothol]] || [[word:wamosojol|wamosojol]] || [[word:wamososhol|wamososhol]] || [[word:wamosokol|wamosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wamosothotho|wamosothotho]] || [[word:wamosojojo|wamosojojo]] || [[word:wamososhosho|wamososhosho]] || [[word:wamosoko|wamosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wamosothon|wamosothon]] || [[word:wamosojon|wamosojon]] || [[word:wamososhon|wamososhon]] || [[word:wamosokon|wamosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wamosothoro|wamosothoro]] || [[word:wamosojoro|wamosojoro]] || [[word:wamososhoro|wamososhoro]] || [[word:wamosokoro|wamosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
